page.title: Runtimes
page.tagline: Machines and cloud workers running CLI sessions for your agents.
page.live_tooltip: Real-time updates · offline detection up to 75s

empty.title: No runtimes yet
empty.hint: Desktop auto-scans your local machine. For AWS EC2 or other remote machines, connect them using the setup wizard.

no_matches.title: No matches
no_matches.try_widening: Try widening the scope or clearing filters.

bootstrapping.title: Starting local runtime…
bootstrapping.hint: This usually takes a few seconds. Your daemon is registering with the workspace.

online.label: Online
online.description: Heartbeat received in the last 45s. Ready to dispatch tasks.

recently_lost.label: Recently lost
recently_lost.description: Lost contact under 5 minutes ago — often a brief network blip.

offline.label: Offline
offline.description: No heartbeat for 5+ minutes. Restart the daemon or investigate the host.

about_to_gc.label: About to GC
about_to_gc.description: Offline 6+ days. Auto-deleted at 7 days unless it reconnects.

detail.no_agents: No agents are bound to this runtime yet.

delete_dialog.title: Delete Runtime
delete_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

detail_page.not_found_hint: It may have been deleted or you may not have access.
